func (m Max) IsSatisfied(obj interface{}) bool {
	var v int
	switch obj.(type) {
	case int64:
		if wordsize == 32 {
			return false
		}
		v = int(obj.(int64))
	case int:
		v = obj.(int)
	case int32:
		v = int(obj.(int32))
	case int16:
		v = int(obj.(int16))
	case int8:
		v = int(obj.(int8))
	default:
		return false
	}

	return v <= m.Max
}
